Enum Class OGLVersion

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<OGLVersion>
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.OGLVersion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<OGLVersion>, java.lang.constant.Constable
public enum OGLVersion extends Enum<OGLVersion> implements Comparable<OGLVersion>
Enumeration of OpenGL versions. This is used for verifying that certain values can be used with certain implementation levels.
Author:
Matthew Tropiano

    • values

      public static OGLVersion[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    • valueOf

      public static OGLVersion valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
